name: chr1p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 1 p-arm pericentric flank (1p11-1p11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr1 centromere. Mixed alpha-satellite, HSat2 patches and pericentromeric segmental duplications (sub-centromeric LCRs of Horvath/She). Largely unassembled in GRCh38; fully resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-satellite HOR (D1Z5/D1Z7) + HSat2 patches + pericentromeric SDs forming Horvath/She sub-centromeric LCR shoreline.
